title: CXXRTL: internal assertion fires as of commit efc43270

features.name: multiple combinational always blocks driving same reg
features.description: Code should include multiple always @(*) blocks that drive the same register variable, causing multiple combinational definitions

features.name: reg written in one always block and read in another
features.description: Code should include a register that is written in one combinational always block and read in a separate combinational always block

features.name: for loop in combinational always block with indexed assignment
features.description: Code should include a for loop inside a combinational always block with indexed array assignment

features.name: wire dependent on reg driven across multiple always blocks
features.description: Code should include a wire that depends on a register which is driven across multiple combinational always blocks
